creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #1)
> Why BSD3CLAUSE? It's ZLIB license. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zlib_License

Hmm... right you are. I'm afraid I was mis-led by the
contents of pkg-descr;

Unalz is a BSD-licensed unarchiver for AlZip format which requires...

Now corrected.

I've updated the svn diff, and will obsolete the previous one.

Thanks, and sorry for the bother, Dmitry.

--Chris
